title: Tosinqas

{{Quote|In a crowded market on Brentaal IV, witnesses report Jedi Reeft was following close behind the disguised suspect when Xexto bounty hunter Tosinqas fell from several stories above, crashing down on the Lopani and killing him. Startled by the sound of Reeft's igniting lightsaber, Tosinqas charged the Jedi halving himself on the drawn weapon.|A HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN53" />}}
'''Tosinqas''' was a [[Xexto/Legends|Xexto]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] active during the [[Great Peace of the Republic|reign]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the Xexto took part in a [[Bounty/Legends|hunt]] for the [[Scoundrel/Legends|criminal]] [[Rotar Lopani]]. Tosinqas found and [[Death/Legends|killed]] Lopani on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]]. However, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Reeft]]—also dispatched to capture Lopani—appeared on the scene. Tosinqas attacked Reeft and was [[Sai tok/Legends|bisected]] by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] blade.

==Biography==
{{Quote|We're receiving more and more work from recognized governments within the Republic. We need better communication and access with the Jedi Temple to give everyone a clearer line of jurisdiction.|Cradossk after Tosinqas's death, in a HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN53" />}}
[[File:Brentaal_TEA.jpg|thumb|right|270px|Tosinqas was killed by Reeft while chasing a bounty on Brentaal IV (pictured).]]
The [[Xexto/Legends|Xexto]] Tosinqas was active during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Great Peace of the Republic|reign]], operating as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] in the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|start]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="HNN53" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> officials of the [[Circarpous sector/Legends|Circarpous sector]] put a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of 8,000 [[Credit ingot/Legends|credits]] on the [[Scoundrel/Legends|thief]] [[Rotar Lopani]]. Tosinqas took the job and found Lopani in a crowded market on<ref name="HNN53" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Into the Core">{{JournalCite|7|Into the Core Worlds}}</ref> [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]].<ref name="HNN53" />

However, the officials of Circarpous had also asked for help from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], which dispatched [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Reeft]] to capture the [[Thief/Legends|thief]]. Tosinqas attacked Lopani from above, falling several stories down on the subject and [[Death/Legends|killing]] him. After that, Reeft, who was also present, activated his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and surprised Tosinqas, who attacked the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Tosinqas was [[Sai tok/Legends|cut in two]] by the Jedi's weapon and killed. Reeft took both the bodies of Lopani and Tosinqas and brought them to<ref name="HNN53" /> the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] planet,<ref name="CATCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Afterward, Bounty Hunter Guild [[Guild Master/Legends|Guildmaster]] [[Cradossk/Legends|Cradossk]] expressed his displeasure about Tosinqas's death, pushing for better communication with Coruscant's [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] to avoid similar situations in the future. The situation was later reported on in an edition of [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]], which included Cradossk's comments.<ref name="HNN53" />

==Personality and traits==
As a bounty hunter, Tosinqas chose to kill Lopani instead of capturing his target alive. Tosinqas was shocked when Reeft activated his lightsaber, and his reaction to attack the Jedi led to his death.<ref name="HNN53" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tosinqas was first mentioned in "Three-Way Hunt Ends with Two Dead," an article<ref name="HNN53" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 53|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #53]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN53" /> on [[April 25]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN53 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6586618|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=Mastadge|date=2002-04-25|time=5:54 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> In [[2007]], when author [[Sander de Lange]] wrote a background story for the Xexto character [[Niai Fieso]] through the [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] feature ''[[What's The Story?]]'', he tried to find Xextos existing in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity and found Tosinqas. He ultimately used the bounty hunter in a different entry, which was never selected via the feature. However, Fieso's other entry—which used another Xexto, [[Freon Drevan]]—was ultimately published.<ref name="blog">{{Blog|exar_xan|13|Behind the story - Niai Fieso}}</ref>
